title: AI-Powered Narrative and Visual Workflow Systems
summary: A comprehensive knowledge base for building AI-driven desktop applications focused on narrative and visual content generation. It covers hierarchical processing, framework-guided restructuring, and sequential rewriting with context. Key patterns include Concurrent Folder Processing (Parallel folders via ThreadPoolExecutor + Sequential chapters via OrderedDict grouping), In-Place Output Resolution (relative pathing), Interruptible API Resilience (stop_check callbacks for immediate cancellation), and Style Synthesis refinements (using descriptive example_hints). The system emphasizes robust error handling, structured CSV outputs, and thread-safe UI interactions.
